stations.name: Closest stations are Fortitude Valley and Bowen Hills
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable for parts of New Farm.

ferry.note: CityCat to the CBD, South Bank, and UQ.

buses.note: Bus routes serve New Farm via Brunswick Street and James Street.

driving.motorway_access: Story Bridge for the CBD and inner-east. Inner City Bypass.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 4 to 7 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Walking access to James Street and Howard Smith Wharves

secondary_state.name: Fortitude Valley State Secondary College or other catchment

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: James Street and the New Farm dining strip on Merthyr Road run together as one of the premium inner-north dining and retail experiences. Howard Smith Wharves and Fortitude Valley dining are within walking distance.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage along New Farm Park.

pockets.name: Riverside / Brunswick Street
pockets.character: Premium streets close to the river and New Farm Park. Heritage character and apartment stock.

pockets.name: Merthyr Road precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the Merthyr Road shopping and dining strip.

pockets.name: James Street side
pockets.character: Streets close to the James Street precinct in Fortitude Valley.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving up to one of Brisbane's most established premium inner-CBD suburbs.
Long-term Brisbane residents moving to apartment or character home living close to the river and the dining strip.
Sydney and Melbourne relocators drawn by the inner-CBD lifestyle and the heritage character.
